Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant The Coleman Company, Inc.
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Noam Glick of Glick Law Group telephone number 619-382-3400 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Arthur Zivkovic.
Elizabeth McNulty of Taylor Anderson LLP telephone number 949-390-6500 appeared by telephone for Defendant Coleman Co.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant The Coleman Company, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order and a separate judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant The Coleman Company, Inc.
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant The Coleman Company, Inc. is continued to June 6, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
